column1: # dec_disk_media_types.tsv -- DEC disk media geometry reference for EmulatR
# All blocks are 512 bytes. total_lbn = sec_trk * heads * cyl.
# SCSI: sec_trk marked ~ is nominal (zone-bit recording); READ CAPACITY total
#       is authoritative, CHS is synthetic (MODE SENSE pages 3/4).
# SDI (MSCP, RA-series): no host-visible CHS; host addresses by LBN and reads
#       a packed media-type identifier. Geometry below is physical layout only.
# DSSI (RF-series) and LESI (RC25): legacy VAX-era; not on the DS10 boot path.
# IDE (dqa): not modeled here -- geometry comes from IdeDisk IDENTIFY DEVICE.
# Capacity column is the marketed/nominal figure; total_lbn is the exact value.
# DEVICE-NAME PREFIXES (STORAGE ONLY) -- VMS / SRM device-name classes
# The geometry rows above are keyed by drive MODEL (RZ29, RA82, ...).  These
# rows are keyed by the OS device-name PREFIX (the device CLASS the prefix
# implies).  Relationship: a model surfaces under a prefix per its interface --
# a SCSI RZ29 appears as DKA<n>:, an MSCP RA82 as DUA<n>:, an IDE disk as
# DQA<n>:.  EmulatR's DS10 boot disk is IDE => DQ (SRM "dqa0."); a SCSI disk on
# the aic78xx would be DK ("dka0.").  VMS device name = <prefix><ctrl-letter>
# <unit>: (e.g. DKA100: = DK, controller A, unit 100 = SCSI bus A / target 1).
# SCOPE: mass storage only -- disk, diskette, tape, optical-as-disk, container,
# medium changer, and storage ports/HBAs.  All non-storage prefixes from the
# source list are EXCLUDED (network EC/EF/EI/EW/EZ/FC/FX/XQ/XU..., terminals
# KB/T/TT/TX/VT/OP/MO/LT/FT/NTY/RT, printers LC/LP, mailbox MB, IPMI CM, ACPI
# SE, comms XA/XD/XF/XG/XI/XJ/XM, DECwindows GH, CI/cluster PA/PE, null NL).
# Card reader CR (unit-record input) is also excluded -- not mass storage.
# "(per src)"  = meaning taken verbatim from the supplied list, unverified.

column3: RP-series MASSBUS disk, alternate controller (per src; verify)
IDE / PATA disk (VAX: RB02 / R80 cartridge)
SWXCR RAID (Mylex DAC960: KZESC/KZPSC/KZPAC); VAX RM03/RM05/RM80, RP07
